problem id: 0a6d48aa
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11011100 -> 00001110
  01001010 -> 10010110
  10001100 -> 01001101
  01110010 -> 01110111
  11011011 -> 11110110
  11100101 -> 11001111
  00101001 -> 01111011
  00010110 -> 01100111
  10010000 -> 10111101

query: 00111111
predicted answer: 11100011
